mapper.sql: id, order_no, item_no, split_item_no, unusual_classify, unusual_type, unusual_identification_code, unusual_desc_eng, handle_time, handle_status, handle_result, handle_user, handle_user_name, record_date, remark, del_flag, create_time, create_user, update_time, update_user, inquiry_date
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_po_delivery_unusual_log
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_po_delivery_unusual_log (id, order_no, item_no, split_item_no, unusual_classify, unusual_type, unusual_identification_code, unusual_desc_eng, handle_time, handle_status, handle_result, handle_user, handle_user_name, record_date, remark, del_flag, create_time, create_user, update_time, update_user, inquiry_date) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{splitItemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{unusualClassify,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unusualType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unusualIdentificationCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unusualDescEng,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{handleTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{handleStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{handleResult,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{handleUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{handleUserName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{recordDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{delFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inquiryDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

update dbo.ops_po_delivery_unusual_log
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

item_no = #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},

unusual_desc_eng = #{unusualDescEng,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inquiry_date = #{inquiryDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
